description_long: This object is a vintage-style television with a boxy, angular body finished in a muted purple color. The front features a convex glass screen above a set of two circular dials and a row of four control knobs, all housed in a metallic or plastic panel. Two long, black telescopic antennas extend from the top, attached to a black base, giving it a classic retro appearance. The back of the television is slightly recessed with a molded panel and a visible power cord that ends in a white plug. The sides are flat and unadorned, with the power cord coiled and hanging loosely. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century televisions, with sturdy feet supporting the base.
description: A retro, boxy purple television with a convex glass screen, two antennas, and a row of control knobs beneath the display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the convex screen, two dials, four control knobs, and both antennas prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat side panel, antenna base, and the coiled power cord extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the recessed back panel, molded details, and the full length of the power cord and plug.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the side panel, antenna base, and the power cord trailing to the rear.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, purple plastic bezel with angular corners and a matte finish
attribute_control_button_layout: row of four knobs and two dials below the screen on the front panel
